items.title: Chipmakers race to improve energy efficiency for AI workloads
items.summary: New chip designs are increasingly focused on reducing power consumption while maintaining performance for AI training and inference.

items.title: Robotics firms expand industrial inspection applications
items.summary: Companies are deploying inspection robots in more hazardous and hard-to-access environments to improve safety and productivity.

items.title: Cloud providers invest more heavily in custom AI infrastructure
items.summary: Large cloud vendors continue to build custom data center hardware and networking systems for large-scale AI deployment.

items.title: Advanced sensors move into more real-time monitoring systems
items.summary: Recent developments in sensing hardware are enabling faster and more continuous monitoring in industrial and infrastructure settings.

items.title: AI tools reshape how engineers review technical documents
items.summary: New AI-assisted review workflows are helping engineers summarize, compare, and search technical materials more efficiently.
